analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The HTML file includes sections for black hole facts, interactive planets, and animated slides. The CSS file has a dark theme with cosmic animations, and the JavaScript file handles interactive elements like planet clicks and slide navigation. The current theme includes black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The event.json specifies the topic as black holes and requests a theme with animated objects and slides.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with more detailed animations for black hole visuals, including gravitational lensing effects, event horizon shimmer, and accretion disk rotation. Add glowing elements and swirling effects to create a more immersive cosmic experience.

Complete the HTML content by adding more interactive elements such as clickable stars, a 3D black hole model, and additional sections on black hole types and phenomena. Ensure all sections are properly included and styled.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners for the new interactive elements and ensure smooth transitions and animations.
